calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 5, 2002
Off Calendar Dec-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter Eric L. Throne. Larry E. Cook, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Lai Wong. Default entered against Rusia L. Lematua. Plaintiff, Lai Wong was sworn and examined. The Court hears evidence and good cause appearing, grants Judgment for the Plaintiff as follows: Principal: $200,000.00; Costs: $970.00; for a Total Judgment of $200,970.00. Counsel to prepare judgment for Court's signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Continued To Jan-21-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
